hct.source: Low Hct is associated with anemia, a frequent finding in psoriasis.

hgb.source: Anemia (low Hgb) is common in psoriasis due to chronic inflammation and potential iron deficiency.

mch.source: Low MCH (mean corpuscular hemoglobin) is associated with microcytic anemia, a potential finding in psoriasis.

mchc.source: Low MCHc (mean corpuscular hemoglobin concentration) is associated with microcytic anemia, a potential finding in psoriasis.

mcv.source: Low MCV (microcytosis) can be seen in psoriasis due to iron deficiency anemia.

plt.source: Elevated platelet count (thrombocytosis) can occur in psoriasis as a reactive response to inflammation.

rbc.source: Low RBC count (anemia) is common in psoriasis due to chronic inflammation and potential iron deficiency.

rdw.source: Elevated RDW can indicate increased red blood cell production variability, which may be seen in psoriasis due to inflammation.

wbc.source: Elevated WBC count (leukocytosis) can be seen in psoriasis due to inflammation and potential infection.
